rulings.Case Title: TYRONE L. ADAMS VS. CHARLES L. EASLEY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Donald George Felton (Deceased) By And Through His Personal Representative Mark J. Felton Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss Pursuant To Ccp Section ??583.310, 583.410 And 583.420
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 10, 2021 line 1. DEFENDANT DON FELTON (Deceased) By And Through His Personal Representative Mark J. Felton's Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss Pursuant To Ccp Section 583.310, 583.410 And 583.420 is continued to March 19, 2021. No later than March 5, 2021 Plaintiff to provide evidence of his incapacity between March 14, 2014 and December 30, 2010 (self-serving declaration is insufficient). No further argument is allowed, and no further argument will be considered. Defendant may file a reply, if any no later than March 12, 2021 addressing solely evidence provided by Plaintiff per this order. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: 2400 PACIFIC AVENUE, LLC VS. MATTHEW A. BENNETT ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Reconsideration Of Demurrer To Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 10, 2021 line 5. PLAINTIFF 2400 PACIFIC AVENUE, LLC's Motion For Reconsideration Of Demurrer To Complaint is continued to March 2, 2021 for Defendant to address the new argument raised in the reply re: January 29, 2021 amendment to Covid Tenant Relief Act. (Reply 2:1-8). Defendant's brief, if any, shall be filed and served no later than February 23, 2021. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: CASSANDRE COWMAN VS. RYAN L. ABEL ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiff'S Motion To Enforce Settlement Agreement And For Entry Of Judgment Pursuant To Stipulation And Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 10, 2021 line 6. PLAINTIFF CASSANDRE COWMAN'S Motion To Enforce Settlement Agreement And For Entry Of Judgment Pursuant To Stipulation is GRANTED as follows: Plaintiff shall recover $35,000 in rent and daily damages through end of July, 2020 under the Settlement agreement; $7,000 in daily damages though entry of judgment on September 30, 2020; attorney's fees in the amount of $3,048.50 and costs of this motion in the amount of $60. =(501/CFH)
